**History of Present Illness**
Sandra presented today for knee pain and also disclosed increased alcohol use. She reports that her drinking has increased significantly over the past few months, shifting from a weekend-only drinker (one glass of wine on a Friday night) to essentially nightly drinking. She estimates two to three glasses most nights, though she acknowledged the pours are generous, so we're probably talking more like three to four standard drinks on drinking nights. She skips maybe one to two nights per week. She also reported that she attempted to stop drinking entirely last week and was only able to sustain it for two days before returning to her usual pattern. She said this scared her, which I think reflects good insight. I validated that and framed it positively.
